common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

fileUpload.formatError: File format not supported. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
fileUpload.orClick: or click to select — JPEG, PNG, WebP (max {{maxSize}} MB)

footer.tagline: Plant health companion platform for Indonesian farmers.

hero.description: AgriShield helps farmers, extension workers, and farming communities identify plant conditions faster through leaf photos, then provides clear, easy-to-follow guidance.
hero.highlight1: Easy to use directly from your phone
hero.highlight2: Simple language, easy for farmers to understand
hero.highlight3: Supports decisions before harvest is affected

features.sectionDesc: Choose a feature to explore. Each part keeps the workflow simple from detection to follow-up.

detection.title: Quick Detection
detection.summary: Snap a leaf photo, analysis results in seconds.
detection.detail: Farmers can recognize disease symptoms early from a simple photo. Results are presented in practical language that's easy to follow up in the field.

guidance.title: Action Guide
guidance.summary: Each result comes with structured first steps.
guidance.detail: AgriShield displays priority action recommendations so users know the safest steps to take before plant conditions worsen.

map.title: Distribution Map
map.summary: Monitor plant disease patterns by area.
map.detail: Visual maps help farming communities and extension workers understand which areas need more attention, enabling faster coordination.

alert.title: Early Warning
alert.detail: Users receive early signals to prepare prevention measures. This approach helps maintain harvest quality through timely action.

analytics.title: Trend Summary
analytics.detail: Progress data helps mid-term decision making, including evaluating disease patterns and effectiveness of actions taken.

community.title: Community Space
community.summary: Learn from other farmers' experiences across regions.
community.detail: The community forum accelerates practical experience sharing between users, from early symptoms to relevant field strategies.

howItWorks.title: Three
howItWorks.step1Desc: Photograph leaves showing symptoms using your phone.
howItWorks.step2Desc: The model reads visual patterns and displays a diagnosis.

testimonials.title: What
testimonials.quote1: Since using AgriShield, I can detect leaf blight earlier. My plants were saved and my harvest actually increased by 20%.
testimonials.quote2: This app really helps us in remote areas. No need to travel far to the agricultural center just to ask about plant diseases.
testimonials.quote3: The distribution map feature is amazing. We can coordinate with other farmers in nearby villages to prevent outbreaks from spreading.

cta.description: No credit card needed. Forever free for farmers. Sign up in minutes and start scanning right away.

login.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 3 characters.
login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.decorativeTagline: Protect your plants, protect your harvest

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyDesc: Start your first scan to see statistics here.
dashboard.emptyHistoryDesc: Your scan history will appear here.
dashboard.chartTimelineDesc: Scan volume and disease detection per month

scan.title: Scan Detection
scan.description: Upload leaf photo and get instant diagnosis
scan.locationError: Location permission denied. Check your browser settings.
scan.tipLight: Make sure lighting is bright enough.
scan.tipFocus: Focus the camera on leaf symptoms.
scan.tipDistance: Ideal distance is 10-30 cm from the object.
scan.tipShadow: Avoid shadows covering the symptom area.
scan.resultNotReady: Result not ready yet. Click the button below to check the latest status.
scan.step1Description: Select the type of plant you want to scan.
scan.step2Description: Take a photo of the affected leaf. Make sure the symptoms are clearly visible.
scan.step3Description: Helps track disease spread in your area.
scan.uploadError: Failed to upload image. Please try again.
scan.timeoutError: Analysis is taking longer than expected. Please try again later.
scan.riceTipBody: Focus on the leaf that shows symptoms. Use the camera 15-20 cm from the leaf surface. Make sure lighting is even and your hand doesn't shake.
scan.cornTipBody: Focus on the leaf that shows symptoms. For corn, take the photo from the underside of the leaf as symptoms often start there. Use the camera 15-20 cm away.

map.title: Distribution Map
map.description: Points below come from scans in the last 6 months. Use this data to monitor high-risk areas early.
map.noDataDesc: Map data not available yet. Run a scan with GPS enabled to add new points.
map.noPointsDesc: No points match the filter. Adjust filters to see results.

history.title: Scan History
history.emptyDesc: Your first scan will appear here.

community.title: Community
community.description: Learn from field experiences, symptom questions, and prevention tips from fellow farmers.
community.mockBanner: Showing example discussion data (mock) because community data is not yet available from the server.
community.emptyDesc: Be the first to start a discussion in the community.

postDetail.mockBanner: This is example discussion data (mock) for UI development purposes.

createPostPage.title: New Discussion
createPostPage.description: Share questions, experiences, or tips with the farming community.
createPostPage.titlePlaceholder: E.g.: Rice leaves turning yellow after fertilization
createPostPage.bodyPlaceholder: Describe your question, experience, or tips in detail...
createPostPage.titleTooShort: Title must be at least 5 characters.
createPostPage.bodyTooShort: Content must be at least 10 characters.

fields.title: My Fields
fields.emptyDesc: Add your field to get started.
fields.fieldNoteDesc: Save routine changes to field conditions so disease analysis and recommendations become more accurate.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.dataUnavailable: Admin data is not yet accessible. Make sure your account has admin/government role.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for is not available.
